title: Perry the Platypus
description: A simple resource pack to add Perry the Platypus/Agent P
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/OOTiVmC.png) ## A resource pack I made cause I got bored that adds an extra texture/model to the fox ### This requires **[Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/downloads)** or **[Optifine Alternatives](https://lambdaurora.dev/optifine_alternatives/)** as it is a custom entity model

 

To use this simply use a nametag to name a fox "Perry" (without the quotes) to get Perry without the hat

 

![](https://i.imgur.com/U5ekpjf.png)

 

or use "Agent P" (without the quotes) to get Perry with the hat

 

![](https://i.imgur.com/4ispseG.png)

If you wish to support me or my work feel free to do so below :)
